title: AFRICA PROJECT - ECONOMIC GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
text:
Sub-Saharan Comparison and Modeling
All Countries include:


Ghana
Nigeria
Côte d’Ivoire
Senegal
Cameroon
Togo
Sierra Leone
Liberia

(The US has been added for comparison)
The goal of this is to help visualize comparisons and create actual Solow growth models we can see.


Heritage Index of Economic FreedomBusiness Ready - The World BankCorruptions Perception Index - Transperancy InternationalSolow Growth Models - Penn World Table & World Bank


Below are bar graphs that compare each Economic Index given the list of counties
































































































These reflect the overall index scores from the business ready dataset. Not included are the specific pillars in each of the categories, but the data is stored so I can create graphs if that would be meaningful for analysis or comparison.











































































Below is a bar graph which each nations corruption index score followed by their rank in parenthesis.














Solow Model Parameters by Country (2023)CountryOutput (Y)Technology (A)Capital (K)Labor (L)Output per Worker (y)Capital per Worker (k)Capital Share (a)Labor Growth (n)Depreciation (d)Savings Rate (s)Côte d'Ivoire187,801.4513.45470,748.8411.7415,997.1140,098.850.6680.0290.050.160Cameroon137,202.73345.03320,468.479.7714,036.2932,784.970.3560.0330.050.149Ghana214,890.3399.42595,565.1212.9416,610.2746,035.090.4770.0230.050.080Liberia9,152.1269.6822,396.491.227,519.0618,400.160.4770.0350.050.155Nigeria1,073,451.123.9710,428,547.0084.6012,688.97123,273.030.6880.0490.050.155Senegal74,338.4064.46294,571.287.4010,050.4539,825.640.4770.0270.050.231Sierra Leone24,074.88178.3835,416.523.107,766.5211,425.320.4040.0300.050.106Togo25,827.6648.8781,774.943.477,446.1223,575.720.4990.0310.050.179United States25,034,982.00525.9180,822,920.00167.54149,427.12482,410.420.4320.0120.050.177


All data was taken from the Penn World Table (https://www.rug.nl/ggdc/productivity/pwt/). The World Bank was used for the savings rate which was taken as Gross Savings % GDP (https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/NY.GNS.ICTR.ZS). The most recent available data is from 2023. The depreciate rate I found was not given anywhere, so we are to assume 5%.

Important Note: Savings Rate is missing for Togo, Nigeria, and Liberia. To correct this, the last three known values for Togo are a geometric average (2017-2019) to calculate the current value. For Nigeria and Liberia, the median from all the countries in our report was taken. The same thing is done for Ghana and Liberia in finding alpha or capital share of income.

Import Note: All values are able to be adjusted, so if you found a different number I can put it into the model.

Consideration: I am not sure the savings rate is correct given the actual point on the graph, could be something to discuss or look into.


Côte d’Ivoire









Côte d'Ivoire Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection21,443.661,689.14Steady-State Production21,443.6610,530.17Current Production40,098.8515,997.11

Liberia









Liberia Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection10,408.50887.76Steady-State Production10,408.505,730.76Current Production18,400.167,519.06

Nigeria Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection355.0335.03Steady-State Production355.03226.14Current Production123,273.0312,688.97




Senegal









Senegal Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection23,738.031,817.66Steady-State Production23,738.037,853.50Current Production39,825.6410,050.45




Sierra Leone









Sierra Leone Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection9,612.16770.58Steady-State Production9,612.167,242.97Current Production11,425.327,766.52




Togo









Togo Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection11,486.20930.78Steady-State Production11,486.205,200.24Current Production23,575.727,446.12




United States









United States Solow Model Key CoordinatesPointx_coordinatey_coordinateSteady-State Intersection389,162.624,067.71Steady-State Production389,162.6136,194.10Current Production482,410.4149,427.12







References
Feenstra, Robert C., Robert Inklaar and Marcel P. Timmer (2015), “The Next Generation of the Penn World Table” American Economic Review, 105(10), 3150-3182, available for download at www.ggdc.net/pwt
